# resolve-missing-doc-and-references
Description: Resolves documentation inconsistencies by saving a missing document with a canonical filename and updating all cross-references.
Source: project
1. Identify the specific document that is missing or inconsistently named across various references.
2. Locate the correct version or content of the identified document.
3. Save the document to its designated location, ensuring it uses a canonical and consistent filename.
4. Identify all other documents, specifications, or references that point to the missing or inconsistently named document.
5. Update all identified cross-references to accurately point to the newly saved document using its canonical filename.
